queries.question: Give me descriptions of fixtures each technician uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Fixtures.description  from Lighting_Technicians_Fixtures join Fixtures on Lighting_Technicians_Fixtures.fixtureType = Fixtures.fixtureType join Lighting_Technicians on Lighting_Technicians_Fixtures.technicianID = Lighting_Technicians.technicianID   GROUP BY Lighting_Technicians_Fixtures.fixtureType HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Lighting_Technicians_Fixtures.technicianID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Lighting_Technicians)
queries.note: broken gold SQL: references Lighting_Technicians.id but the column is technicianID (no such column) -> fails on SQLite too; not executable

queries.question: Give me descriptions of fixtures each technician uses.
queries.sql: select lighting_technicians.name , fixtures.description from Lighting_Technicians_Fixtures join Fixtures on Lighting_Technicians_Fixtures.fixtureType = Fixtures.fixtureType join Lighting_Technicians on Lighting_Technicians_Fixtures.technicianID = Lighting_Technicians.technicianID
